title: athyrium alpestre subsp. americanum
intro: Athyrium alpestre subsp. americanum, also known as American Lady Fern, is a subspecies of perennial fern native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Athyrium alpestre subsp. americanum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
